purpose: Replace remaining strict chat-JSON LLM dependencies in Hub task planning/completion with artifact/file-manifest based worker handoff and completion.
problem_statement: A real test showed generated files existed and were usable, but Hub bookkeeping stayed stuck because an LLM returned useful chat/Markdown instead of strict JSON. The Hub must treat files/artifacts/manifests/verification as the source of truth. JSON schemas remain valid for Hub-generated contracts and manifests, but model chat JSON must not be the primary control path.

observed_files: agent/services/worker_todo_planner_service.py currently builds deterministic todo contracts but can optionally refine tasks through an LLM and json.loads() its output.
agent/services/planning_utils.py contains JSON extraction/parsing helpers for subtasks and follow-up analysis.
schemas/worker/worker_execution_request.v1.json already has requested_outputs but not a hard artifact_manifest output protocol.
docs/artifact-traceability-model.md already states artifacts are the primary user-facing output and should be traceable.
observed_failure_mode: Hub still waited/retried because model response was not strict JSON.
Manual task completion patch was needed although filesystem output was ready.

global_principles: Hub state changes must be based on validated artifacts, file manifests, verification evidence and deterministic completion policy.
LLM chat output may be stored as summary or proposal, never as sole authority for completed state.
Workers should receive file-based handoff bundles and write files plus artifact_manifest.v1.json.
Malformed optional planner/follow-up JSON must never create an infinite retry loop when required artifacts are valid.
Task graph mutation from LLM output requires proposal artifact, deterministic validation and audit.
All produced files must stay inside workspace and be represented by artifact metadata and hashes.
non_goals: Do not remove deterministic JSON schemas for Hub-built contracts.
Do not trust arbitrary generated files without manifest, workspace boundary and verification.
Do not keep strict chat-JSON as default planner/completion behavior.
Do not let the final assistant message mark a task completed.

tasks.title: Inventory all authoritative JSON-from-LLM paths
tasks.problem: Some Hub paths still parse model chat text as JSON for planning or follow-up decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Every json.loads/extract_json_payload/parse_subtasks_from_llm_response/parse_followup_analysis use that can affect task graph or task state is listed and classified.
Safe deterministic schema validation is distinguished from unsafe model-chat JSON parsing.
Any unsafe path is mapped to a concrete task in this file.
A static regression test fails if a new authoritative 'Return JSON only' task-completion path is introduced.
test_requirements: Add static/inventory test for JSON-primary anti-patterns.
anti_patterns: Do not treat all JSON parsing as bad; Hub-generated contract JSON remains valid.

tasks.title: Default-disable planner LLM task refinement
tasks.problem: worker_todo_planner_service currently can call an LLM and parse returned task JSON even though a deterministic base contract already exists.
acceptance_criteria: planner_llm_enabled defaults to false for authoritative worker todo generation.
Default build_delegation_todo_contract path never calls generate_text.
Deterministic base_task remains valid and includes expected_artifacts.
Malformed planner output cannot make todo_contract.todo.tasks empty.
Generation metadata reports artifact_first or deterministic_only by default.
test_requirements: Monkeypatch generate_text and prove it is not called by default.
anti_patterns: Do not keep LLM planner refinement as default authoritative task source.

tasks.title: Convert planner LLM output into PlannerProposalArtifact
tasks.problem: Optional LLM planning can still be useful, but it must not directly replace deterministic todo tasks.
acceptance_criteria: PlannerProposalArtifact schema exists with raw_text_ref, parse_status, parsed_items, parse_error, source_model and adoption_status.
Markdown/natural-language/malformed JSON creates proposal artifact with parse_status failed or unparsed and deterministic contract continues.
Valid JSON becomes parsed proposal items only; it does not overwrite todo tasks directly.
Adopting proposal items requires deterministic validation and audit.
test_requirements: Tests for Markdown, malformed JSON and valid JSON proposal output.
anti_patterns: Do not mutate task graph directly from model output.

tasks.title: Demote follow-up JSON parsing to advisory only
tasks.problem: parse_followup_analysis can return task_complete and followup_tasks from model JSON. That must not drive completed state.
acceptance_criteria: No production completed-state transition depends solely on parse_followup_analysis.task_complete.
Follow-up parsing is marked advisory and stored as suggestion/proposal only.
Malformed follow-up JSON does not requeue a task when artifact completion policy succeeds.
Completion policy reason code can record advisory_parse_failed_ignored.
test_requirements: Regression test: valid artifacts plus malformed follow-up JSON still completes or needs_review without retry loop.
anti_patterns: Do not treat LLM 'task_complete=true' as authoritative.

tasks.title: Define ArtifactManifest v1
tasks.problem: Generated files need a deterministic manifest so the Hub can validate outputs without chat JSON.
acceptance_criteria: ArtifactManifest contains schema, manifest_id, goal_id, task_id, execution_id, trace_id, workspace_root_ref, produced_by_worker_id, produced_at, summary and artifacts.
Artifact entry contains artifact_id, kind, relative_path, content_hash, size_bytes, classification, operation, required, verification_status and metadata.
Absolute paths and path traversal are rejected.
Kinds include generated_file, modified_file, patch_file, command_output, test_result, verification_result, planner_proposal and summary.
Fixture for fibonacci_project with app.py, requirements.txt and README.md validates.
test_requirements: Schema tests for valid manifest, missing hash and path traversal.
anti_patterns: Do not infer artifact identity from assistant text.

tasks.title: Define FileChangeSet v1 for workspace diff
tasks.problem: The Hub needs before/after file evidence for workers that modify files but do not write manifests yet.
acceptance_criteria: FileChangeSet contains before_snapshot_id, after_snapshot_id, created_files, modified_files, deleted_files, ignored_files and workspace_boundary_status.
Each file entry contains relative_path, before_hash, after_hash, size_bytes, classification and safe_preview_ref.
Out-of-workspace changes are detected and marked violation.
Large files are referenced by hash/ref, not inlined.
test_requirements: Workspace diff tests for created, modified, deleted and out-of-workspace files.
anti_patterns: Do not trust worker-reported changed files without independent diff when possible.

tasks.title: Define WorkerHandoffBundle v1
tasks.problem: Workers should receive file-based handoff with instructions and expected artifacts, not a demand for final chat JSON.
acceptance_criteria: WorkerHandoffBundle contains task_id, goal_id, execution_id, trace_id, instructions_ref, context_envelope_ref, expected_artifacts, workspace_constraints, policy_decision_ref, manifest_output_path and completion_policy_ref.
Bundle materializes as files such as .ananta/handoff/<execution_id>/worker_handoff.json and instructions.md.
Bundle explicitly instructs worker to write artifact_manifest.v1.json.
Manifest output path is validated inside workspace.
test_requirements: Handoff bundle schema and generation tests.
anti_patterns: Do not encode all control state only in natural-language prompt.

tasks.title: Extend worker execution request for manifest protocol
tasks.problem: worker_execution_request.v1 has requested_outputs but lacks a required artifact manifest output path.
acceptance_criteria: Request supports artifact_manifest_required and artifact_manifest_output_path or v2 equivalent.
requested_outputs supports artifact_manifest.
When artifact_manifest_required=true, final chat response cannot substitute for manifest.
Legacy request compatibility is preserved or v2 migration tests are added.
test_requirements: Schema tests for manifest-required and legacy request.
anti_patterns: Do not break existing clients without compatibility path.

tasks.title: Create ArtifactCompletionPolicy contract
tasks.problem: The Hub needs a deterministic policy for when artifacts complete a task.
acceptance_criteria: Policy contains required_artifact_kinds, required_paths, optional_paths, verification_required, completion_on_valid_manifest, needs_review_conditions and retry_conditions.
Decision statuses include completed, needs_review, retryable_failed, failed, denied and degraded.
Malformed advisory JSON is not a retry condition when artifacts and verification pass.
Fibonacci Flask task policy can require app.py, requirements.txt and README.md.
test_requirements: Completion policy tests for valid files, missing file, invalid manifest and failed verification.
anti_patterns: Do not mark completed from file existence alone without expected-artifact policy.

tasks.title: Materialize handoff files before worker execution
tasks.problem: The worker must get concrete handoff files in workspace.
acceptance_criteria: WorkerHandoffService creates .ananta/handoff/<execution_id>/ before execution.
It writes worker_handoff.json, instructions.md, expected_artifacts.json and completion_policy.json or refs.
NativeWorkerRuntimeService references the handoff bundle.
All handoff paths are workspace-bound.
test_requirements: Filesystem tests for generated handoff directory.
anti_patterns: Do not pass expected outputs only in prompt text.

tasks.title: Collect artifact manifest after worker execution
tasks.problem: After execution, the Hub must read files/manifests and not depend on the final chat answer.
acceptance_criteria: Collector reads artifact_manifest.v1.json from configured path.
Collector validates schema and hashes.
Collector verifies declared files exist and are inside workspace.
Collection result includes manifest_valid, artifacts, errors and warnings.
Missing manifest can fall back to synthesized manifest only if policy allows.
test_requirements: Valid manifest, missing manifest, invalid hash and path traversal tests.
anti_patterns: Do not mark task complete from final assistant text alone.

tasks.title: Synthesize manifest from workspace diff as migration bridge
tasks.problem: External workers may modify files but not write Ananta manifests yet.
acceptance_criteria: WorkspaceDiffService snapshots before and after execution.
Synthesized manifest includes created/modified/deleted files with hashes.
Synthesized manifest is marked synthesized=true and lower trust.
Completion can use synthesized manifest only when policy permits it.
Fibonacci files without manifest can be completed through synthesized manifest if allowed.
test_requirements: Workspace diff and synthesized manifest tests.
anti_patterns: Do not synthesize from a broad scan without before snapshot.

tasks.title: Persist artifacts and manifest through ArtifactStore/DB
tasks.problem: Produced files must become durable artifacts with metadata and hashes.
acceptance_criteria: Each required artifact gets artifact_id and integrity_hash.
Metadata includes goal_id, task_id, execution_id, trace_id, producer_worker_id, kind, relative_path, classification and verification_status.
Artifact persistence failure prevents completed state.
Task detail API can retrieve artifact metadata.
test_requirements: Artifact persistence success/failure tests.
anti_patterns: Do not keep artifacts only as temporary workspace files.

tasks.title: Implement artifact-first TaskCompletionPolicyService
tasks.problem: Task completion must be centralized and based on artifacts/verification.
acceptance_criteria: Service evaluates expected_artifacts, ArtifactManifest, FileChangeSet, VerificationResult and exit status.
It returns completed, needs_review, retryable_failed, failed, denied or degraded plus reason_codes.
Malformed model JSON is advisory only.
TaskRuntime/Orchestration uses this service for final state update.
test_requirements: Unit and integration tests for completion decisions.
anti_patterns: Do not implement completion logic separately in multiple services.

tasks.title: Update state machine to prevent parse-error retry loops
tasks.problem: Malformed optional JSON must not bounce tasks back into queue forever.
acceptance_criteria: Parser failures from advisory paths do not set tasks back to queued when artifacts pass.
Retry counter increments only for retryable execution/artifact/verification failures.
Task reaches completed when artifacts and verification pass even if final response is Markdown.
Ambiguous partial artifacts reach needs_review or degraded, not infinite retry.
Max retry guard exists with terminal reason.
test_requirements: Regression test for files-exist-but-json-invalid scenario.
anti_patterns: Do not requeue on every parser exception.

tasks.title: Add ArtifactRealityReconciliationService
tasks.problem: During migration, Hub state may disagree with filesystem/artifact reality.
acceptance_criteria: Service can dry-run compare expected artifacts with workspace/artifact store.
Apply uses TaskCompletionPolicyService, not blind status patch.
State changes require permission and audit reason.
Invalid/out-of-workspace artifacts are refused.
Queued task with valid artifacts can be safely reconciled to completed.
test_requirements: Reconciliation dry-run and apply tests.
anti_patterns: Do not expose direct mark-completed as normal fix.

tasks.title: Add bounded RetryPolicyService classifications
tasks.problem: Retry reasons must distinguish parser failure, missing artifact, failed verification and actual worker failure.
acceptance_criteria: planner_llm_parse_failed is non-retryable when deterministic contract exists.
advisory_json_parse_failed is ignored when artifact completion succeeds.
missing_required_artifact is retryable only up to max retry limit.
verification_failed can become retryable, failed or needs_review based on policy.
Retry reason and count are persisted/visible.
test_requirements: Retry matrix tests.
anti_patterns: Do not treat parser error as equivalent to missing files.

tasks.title: Run verification from produced artifacts/files
tasks.problem: Success must be verified from files/tests, not from model claims.
acceptance_criteria: Verification receives ArtifactManifest/FileChangeSet and expected_artifacts.
It can check file existence, hash, content pattern and safe test command results.
VerificationResult references artifact_ids and evidence refs.
Task cannot complete when verification_required=true and verification fails/missing.
test_requirements: Fibonacci Flask project verification and failed verification tests.
anti_patterns: Do not accept 'I tested it' text as verification.

tasks.title: Extend TraceBundle with artifact handoff lifecycle
tasks.problem: Operators need traceability from handoff to artifacts to completion decision.
acceptance_criteria: Trace contains handoff_bundle_ref, manifest_ref, file_change_set_ref, artifact_ids, verification_ref and completion_decision_ref.
Trace records whether manifest was worker-authored or synthesized.
Trace records advisory_json_parse_status separately from completion decision.
Trace excludes raw file contents by default.
test_requirements: Trace tests for artifact-first flow.
anti_patterns: Do not put full generated files in trace metadata.

tasks.title: Audit artifact-first transitions
tasks.problem: Completing tasks from artifacts and reconciling state must be auditable.
acceptance_criteria: Audit events include worker_handoff_created, artifact_manifest_collected, artifact_manifest_synthesized, artifact_completion_decided, task_finalized_from_artifacts and advisory_json_parse_failed_ignored.
Events include goal_id, task_id, execution_id, manifest_id, artifact_ids and decision reason_codes.
Manual reconciliation includes actor and reason.
Raw artifact contents are not audited by default.
test_requirements: Audit event tests.
anti_patterns: Do not silently repair Hub bookkeeping without audit.

tasks.title: Expose artifact-first status in API/UI/CLI
tasks.problem: Users should see produced files, manifest status and completion reason instead of only LLM text/state.
acceptance_criteria: Task detail API includes artifact_summary, completion_decision, reason_codes, manifest_status, verification_status and advisory_parse_status.
UI shows produced artifacts/files with status badges.
CLI lists artifact kind, path, verification status and hash prefix.
Parser failure is displayed as warning when artifact completion succeeded.
test_requirements: API status tests and frontend/CLI tests where framework exists.
anti_patterns: Do not show raw LLM response as the only result.

tasks.title: Add artifact-first run preview
tasks.problem: Before execution, operator should see expected artifacts and completion rules.
acceptance_criteria: Preview API returns expected_artifacts, manifest_output_path, completion_policy_summary and verification_requirements.
Preview shows whether legacy JSON planner is disabled/advisory/enabled.
Preview shows workspace output boundary.
Preview endpoint does not execute worker.
test_requirements: Preview API tests for Flask/Fibonacci task.
anti_patterns: Do not hide completion criteria from operator.

tasks.title: E2E regression: Fibonacci files complete despite malformed final JSON
tasks.problem: The exact observed failure must become a regression test.
acceptance_criteria: Test creates app.py, requirements.txt and README.md in fibonacci_project workspace.
Mock worker/model final response is Markdown or normal chat text, not valid JSON.
Hub collects artifacts and validates expected files.
Task does not retry because final response is non-JSON.
Task final state is completed or needs_review according to verification policy, with reason code showing parser failure ignored if artifacts passed.
test_requirements: pytest tests/e2e/test_artifact_first_fibonacci_flow.py
anti_patterns: Do not use a test where worker returns perfect JSON.

tasks.title: Regression tests for worker_todo_planner malformed LLM output
tasks.problem: Planner LLM output can include Markdown/backticks/explanations. That must not break the Hub.
acceptance_criteria: Malformed planner output returns deterministic contract and warning/proposal artifact.
Markdown fenced output does not crash.
Natural language output is stored as proposal/advisory, not task replacement.
No path requeues task solely because planner parse failed.
test_requirements: Monkeypatch generate_text with malformed, Markdown and natural-language outputs.
anti_patterns: Do not require real LM Studio or any live model in the test.

tasks.title: Security tests for artifact paths and manifest trust
tasks.problem: Artifact-first file handling must not create path traversal or secret leakage risks.
acceptance_criteria: Manifest entry with ../ path is rejected.
Absolute path outside workspace is rejected.
Symlink escaping workspace is rejected or flagged violation.
Large files are ref-handled without inlining into DB/logs.
Secret-looking files are classified and not automatically sent to memory/cloud.
test_requirements: Artifact path security tests.
anti_patterns: Do not trust manifest paths from worker blindly.

tasks.title: Write artifact-first architecture and migration docs
tasks.problem: Docs must make clear that chat JSON is not the authoritative worker protocol.
acceptance_criteria: Docs explain Hub -> handoff files -> worker -> artifact manifest -> collector -> verification -> completion policy.
Docs explain final chat response is summary/advisory only.
Docs include artifact_manifest.v1.json example for Fibonacci Flask project.
Docs explain legacy JSON planner mode and why it is off by default.
This todo JSON remains valid and is updated after implementation slices.
test_requirements: json.loads todo.artifact-first-worker-handoff-fixup.json succeeds.
anti_patterns: Do not document strict JSON final response as recommended worker protocol.

definition_of_done_global: Worker/task planning no longer depends on strict JSON from model chat as primary success path.
Planner/follow-up LLM output is proposal/advisory only unless deterministically adopted.
Workers receive file handoff bundles and produce files plus artifact manifests or diff-derived manifests.
Hub completion uses artifacts, manifests, verification and completion policy.
Malformed Markdown/non-JSON model responses cannot create infinite retry loops when artifacts pass.
Fibonacci Flask project regression passes with non-JSON final response.
Artifact paths are workspace-bound and security-tested.
UI/API/CLI show artifact-first completion reasons and parser warnings separately.
summary_notes: The target is not JSON-free. It is chat-JSON-free for authoritative control.
Hub-generated JSON contracts and artifact manifests remain required and validated.
The fastest safe fix is default-disable planner LLM refinement, add artifact manifests/output collection, and make completion ignore advisory JSON parse failures when artifacts pass.
